inputs.label: Initial Quantity
inputs.businessContext: The initial mass or amount of substance at time zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial mass or amount of substance at time zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır zamanındaki başlangıç kütlesi veya miktarı.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Measurement uncertainty or tolerance percentage applied to the initial quantity (e.g., ±5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Measurement uncertainty or tolerance percentage applied to the initial quantity (e.g., ±5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıç miktarına uygulanan ölçüm belirsizliği veya tolerans yüzdesi (örn. ±%5).

inputs.label: Half-Life
inputs.businessContext: The half-life of the substance in consistent time units.

businessContext_i18n.en: The half-life of the substance in consistent time units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maddenin tutarlı zaman birimleri cinsinden yarılanma süresi.

inputs.label: Elapsed Time
inputs.businessContext: The total elapsed time since start, in the same time unit as half-life.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total elapsed time since start, in the same time unit as half-life.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başlangıçtan bu yana geçen toplam süre, yarılanma süresi ile aynı zaman biriminde.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
